speaker: szarfman
text: RGPS is much, much better at unmasking signals than MGPS. It automatically identifies and corrects for confounders. This is an important function to have, given the pandemic situation.
context: Szarfman urged Menschik directly to adopt the RGPS methodology, after Commonwealth contractors directed her to speak with him or Baer about her data mining questions.
emphasis_words: RGPS is much, much better at unmasking signals than MGPS.
This is an important function to have, given the pandemic situation.
